children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may, directly or through awards to eligible entities, provide technical assistance for developing, assisting, and coordinating parent training and information programs carried out by parent training and information centers receiving assistance under and community parent resource centers receiving assistance under .section 1471 of this titlesection 1472 of this title

children.heading: Definition of eligible entity
children.label: 2 Definition of eligible entity
children.text: In this section, the term “eligible entity” has the meaning given the term in .section 1461(b) of this title
effective coordination of parent training efforts;
dissemination of scientifically based research and information;
promotion of the use of technology, including assistive technology devices and assistive technology services;
reaching underserved populations, including parents of low-income and limited English proficient children with disabilities;
including children with disabilities in general education programs;

children.label: C
children.text: elementary school to secondary school; and

children.label: D
children.text: secondary school to postsecondary environments; and
promotion of alternative methods of dispute resolution, including mediation.

children.heading: Collaboration with the resource centers
children.label: c Collaboration with the resource centers
children.text: Each eligible entity receiving an award under subsection (a) shall develop collaborative agreements with the geographically appropriate regional resource center and, as appropriate, the regional educational laboratory supported under , to further parent and professional collaboration.section 9564 of this title
